# LaunchNow by CyberG7 Technologies

> LaunchNow builds and launches a professional starter website for Singapore startups and SMEs in 7 days for S$288 — first year of hosting included.

## What LaunchNow is
LaunchNow is the rapid website-launch service from CyberG7 Technologies (Singapore). It designs, builds, and ships a professional Phase 1 starter website in 7 days, so small businesses establish online credibility fast without high upfront cost. ACRA-registered; SME Centre supported.

## Services
- [7-Day Website Launch](https://launchnow.cyberg7.com.sg/): Professional, mobile-responsive starter website with basic SEO, live in 7 days. S$288, first year of hosting included.
- [Affordable Web Design Singapore](https://launchnow.cyberg7.com.sg/affordable-web-design-singapore): Low-cost professional web design for SMEs.
- [Web Design Singapore](https://launchnow.cyberg7.com.sg/web-design-singapore): Singapore-focused website design and build.
- [Website in 7 Days](https://launchnow.cyberg7.com.sg/website-in-7-days-singapore): Fast-turnaround website launch.
- [AI WhatsApp Chatbot Singapore](https://launchnow.cyberg7.com.sg/ai-whatsapp-chatbot-singapore): Add an AI WhatsApp chatbot to your site.

## Important pages
- [About](https://launchnow.cyberg7.com.sg/about): Who CyberG7 Technologies is.
- [Contact](https://launchnow.cyberg7.com.sg/contact): How to reach us.
- [Start your build](https://launchnow.cyberg7.com.sg/intake): Project intake form.

## Trust signals
- Operated by CyberG7 Technologies, Singapore — ACRA-registered, SME Centre supported.
- Area served: Singapore.
- Contact: +65 8671 1010 · cyberg7.llp@gmail.com
- Price: S$288 (Phase 1 Starter Website), first year of hosting included.

## What LaunchNow is NOT
- Not a DIY website builder — it is a done-for-you design and launch service.
- Not a cybersecurity or PDPA-compliance consultancy. A PDPA notice exists only as a standard website policy page, not a service offering.
